meaning: adj.用手腕的 用腕部动作的
examples: Led by wristy batsmen, like Javed Miandad, and blood-curdling fast bowlers, like Imran Khan, Pakistan has often excelled at the world's most popular sport after football.
Australia's first match of this World Cup will feature Warne pitting his skills at the dusty Wanderers ground in Johannesburg against a stack of talented, wristy Pakistani batsmen.
Pathan continued to keep the runs flowing in wristy fashion, but the excellent Morne Morkel (3-28) returned to dismiss Suresh Raina, before Harbhajan was dropped by Duminy in the gully.
